# Shriyash Sharma

> Shriyash Sharma is a Senior Software Engineer and AI Engineer specializing in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), semantic search, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, pgvector, Next.js, and production system design. Website: https://shriyashsharma.com

Shriyash Sharma builds full-stack engineering systems with a focus on applied AI: RAG pipelines, embeddings, vector search, FastAPI backends, PostgreSQL with pgvector, and Next.js frontends. This site is his personal AI engineering portfolio — projects, case studies, technical writing, and interactive AI Lab tools.

## Person
- Name: Shriyash Sharma
- Role: Senior Software Engineer, AI Engineer
- Website: https://shriyashsharma.com
- Location: Pune, India
- Specializations: AI Engineering, RAG, FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL, pgvector, Semantic Search, System Design, SaaS Architecture
- Products: TeamShastra (field workforce operations platform)

## Projects
- [Projects](https://shriyashsharma.com/projects): Independent products and engineering systems built with Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, pgvector, and semantic retrieval.

## Case Studies
- [Case Studies](https://shriyashsharma.com/case-studies): In-depth engineering case studies covering architecture decisions, RAG pipelines, delivery, and measurable outcomes.

## Blog
- [Blog](https://shriyashsharma.com/blog): Technical writing on AI engineering, RAG, embeddings, vector search, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and platform architecture.

## AI Lab
- [AI Lab](https://shriyashsharma.com/ai-lab): Interactive tools to learn RAG, embeddings, vector search, and semantic retrieval. Educational visualizations for modern AI system architecture.
- [RAG Explorer](https://shriyashsharma.com/ai-lab/rag-explorer): Interactive RAG tutorial — step-by-step visualization of chunking, embeddings, vector search, retrieval, prompt construction, and grounded answer generation. Covers: what is RAG, RAG explained, embeddings explained, vector search explained, chunking in RAG.

## About
- [About Shriyash Sharma](https://shriyashsharma.com/about): Background, professional experience, TeamShastra, AI portfolio platform, and AI engineering focus areas.

## Contact
- [Contact](https://shriyashsharma.com/contact): Reach Shriyash Sharma for engineering roles, speaking, and collaboration.
